message:
fix(tui): resolve 39 clippy warnings in tui_widgets.rs

Address all clippy lints: cast_possible_truncation allows, if-let to
map_or/map_or_else conversions, too_many_lines allows, similar-name
renames, const hoisting, common-code hoisting, u8/i32 as f64 to
f64::from(), mul_add usage, identity-op simplification, and float
comparison with epsilon.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
